news.title: US stocks today: US stocks dip as US-Iran tensions weigh on sentiment
news.description: US stocks fell as US-Iran tensions weighed on sentiment, dragging Dow, S&P 500 and Nasdaq lower. Tech stocks led declines even as Meta surged on AI cloud plans. Investors also tracked Fed rate hike risks, weak manufacturing data, and upcoming US jobs report amid cautious start to second half.
